About Me
Sr. Solutions Consultant · Fintech and Risk Decisioning
Khurram P.
Sr. Solutions Consultant
Provenir · Orlando, FL
Let's Connect
A bit about me

As a Senior Solutions Consultant, I partner with revenue teams to bridge the gap between complex technical products and the business outcomes customers actually care about. Whether I'm leading a discovery call, architecting a solution demo, or aligning stakeholders across technical and executive teams, my goal is always the same: make the complex feel simple and the value feel real.

I specialize in deals that require more than a polished slide deck. Multi-stakeholder environments, deep API and data workflow conversations, and buyers who need to trust the solution before they'll ever sign the contract.

What makes my approach a bit different? My roots are in post-sales solutioning. I spent my early career on the implementation side, working with the teams who inherit the promises made during the sales cycle. That experience sharpened my instincts around discovery, taught me which questions actually move deals forward, and showed me why building customer trust early is everything. That perspective now drives everything I do in pre-sales.

I don't just sell solutions. I help customers find the right one.

Current Role Active
Sr. Solutions Consultant (Pre-Sales)
Provenir · Feb 2026 – Present
About Provenir
Provenir is a global fintech recognized by the Global BankTech Awards as the 2023 "Best Credit and Risk Solution by a Vendor." Partnering with fintechs, financial institutions, and payment providers, Provenir's risk-decisioning platform empowers businesses to create digital-first solutions across credit risk, fraud, AI/ML analytics, and identity - helping them make smarter decisions, faster.
What I Do
Trusted advisor partnering with customer-facing teams to sell Provenir's risk-decisioning platform. I lead customer discovery, build compelling story-driven demos and presentations, contribute to RFP responses, and act as the go-to technical and business expert - internally and externally - throughout the full pre-sales cycle.

Solutions Engineering Resources
Books, podcasts, and communities that have shaped how I think about solutions engineering
📘
The Six Habits of Highly Effective Sales Engineers
Book
by Chris White
The definitive playbook for SE excellence. Chris White breaks down the mindset, habits, and techniques that separate good SEs from great ones - from discovery questioning to demo mastery. Required reading for anyone serious about pre-sales.
Chris White on LinkedIn
🎙️
Diary of a Sales Engineer
Podcast
Real talk from practitioners in the SE world
One of the best SE-specific podcasts out there. Honest conversations about the day-to-day realities of pre-sales - career growth, demo strategy, working with AEs, and navigating complex deals. Highly relevant for SEs at any level.
Website LinkedIn
🤝
PreSales Collective
Community
The largest global community for SE professionals
The go-to community for solutions engineers and pre-sales professionals worldwide. Resources, events, job boards, certifications, and peer connections - an invaluable network for anyone building a career in pre-sales.
Website LinkedIn
Tools Worth Knowing as a Solutions Engineer
📞
Gong
Revenue Intelligence
AI-powered conversation intelligence for call recording, deal analysis, and coaching. A must-have for any SE wanting to understand what actually moves prospects and sharpen their discovery and demo delivery.
gong.io →
🎬
Coast
API Demo Platform
An interactive API demo platform that lets SEs build and share live, clickable API demos without needing a full sandbox environment. Great for accelerating technical evaluations and making API capabilities tangible for non-technical buyers.
trycoast.com →
📊
Pendo
Product Analytics
Product analytics and in-app guidance platform. Useful for SEs to understand how prospects engage with a product, surface adoption insights, and build more targeted value conversations around actual usage data.
pendo.io →
📋
Responsive
RFP Automation
The leading RFP response management platform. Centralizes your content library, automates repetitive responses, and coordinates cross-functional contributors - turning a painful multi-week process into a streamlined, repeatable motion.
responsive.io →
✨
Storylane
Interactive Demo Platform
Fast-growing interactive demo builder that lets SEs create self-guided product tours in minutes. Strong on analytics - you can see exactly which steps prospects engage with most, which helps sharpen demo flows based on real buyer behavior rather than guesswork.
storylane.io →
🚀
Apollo.io
Sales Intelligence
Sales intelligence and engagement platform with a massive B2B contact database. Helpful for SEs doing pre-call research, identifying key stakeholders at target accounts, and understanding org structures before walking into a discovery or demo.
apollo.io →
✕
✦
AI in My Pre-Sales Work
How I've integrated AI across the SE lifecycle
📋
AI-Accelerated RFP Development
Built AI-assisted RFP workflows that cut response time dramatically; using LLMs to draft, map requirements, and generate first-pass answers from prior win content. Shortened multi-week RFP cycles while improving consistency and quality across 300+ requirement responses.
🤖
AI Agent for RFP Orchestration
Explored and designed agentic workflows to automate RFP triage; categorizing question types, surfacing relevant prior answers, and flagging gaps for SE review. Reduces cognitive load on large RFP documents and keeps SE focus on high-value differentiation.
🎯
Demo & Presentation Acceleration
Leveraged generative AI to rapidly produce customized slide decks, executive summaries, and demo scripts tailored to specific buyer personas and verticals. Cut prep time for prospect-facing materials while increasing personalization depth and quality.
🔍
LLM-Assisted Data & POC Analysis
Applied prompt engineering and LLM-assisted workflows to accelerate customer data studies; identifying anomalies, normalizing edge cases, and surfacing match-rate patterns across large enterprise datasets. Used to compress POC delivery timelines without sacrificing rigor.
🎭
AI-Powered Demo & Talk Track Stress Testing
Used AI as a sparring partner to pressure-test demo flows and talk tracks before live prospect engagements. Simulated tough buyer personas - skeptical CTOs, cost-focused CFOs, compliance-driven risk teams - to surface weak objection handling, tighten value narratives, and identify gaps in technical explanations before they surface in front of a real audience.
